prompt: /ulw write a concise decision proposal for adopting the release-readiness audit workflow

hard_checks.description: Every supplied cost, constraint, and decision fact remains accurate.
The proposal makes an explicit recommendation for the named audience.
The delivered artifact renders without clipping or missing content.

rubric.audience: An engineering leadership team deciding whether and how to adopt a release-readiness audit.
constraints: Do not invent unsupported savings or incident data
task_specific_anchors: The recommendation is organized around the decision rather than around background summary.
Risks and objections change the proposal instead of appearing as ceremonial caveats.
A reversible adoption path, decision trigger, or kill criterion makes the proposal operationally forward-looking.
